CVE-2019-20373.title: LTSP LDM through 2.18.06 allows fat-client root access because th ...
CVE-2019-20373.description: LTSP LDM through 2.18.06 allows fat-client root access because the LDM_USERNAME variable may have an empty value if the user's shell lacks support for Bourne shell syntax. This is related to a run-x-session script.
